violations.description: Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. Observed home canned foods in East refrigerator.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Observed wiping cloth lying on counter next to bucket of sanitizer.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Observed damage seals on small chest freezer and long chest freezer.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
